title: Underground Bunkers
description: Randomly generated bunkers hidden within your worlds
body:
![Underground Bunkers](https://i.postimg.cc/4NHjPS6Q/bunkers-banner.png)

 

**Underground Bunkers** creates procedurally generated abandoned shelters within your worlds. These dungeons can be found in the overworld and may contain all kinds of loot, as well as enemies and traps.

This mod was created for an upcoming survival modpack.

**Available versions**

1.19.2

1.19.3

1.19.4

1.20

1.20.1

1.20.2

1.20.3

1.20.4

 

Future additions may include modded cross compatibilities (particularly tech mods and Create).

 \* All pictures taken using [Rethinking Voxels](https://modrinth.com/shader/rethinking-voxels) shaders.

 

##### **FAQ**

**Can I use this mod server-side only?**

Yes

**Is this compatible with other structure mods?**

Yes

**The latest version is 1.20.4, can I use it on previous versions?**

Yes, we support all sub-versions from 1.19.2 to 1.20.4.
